text: A motorcyclist riding down the highway at a high rate of speed.

Front view of a blue and white jet airliner on runway.
A young man on a skateboard in midair near a ledge.

A rural area shows trucks and buildings outside a green, fenced in area with a small standing horse, nuzzling a second and larger horse.
